summary: Tested 8 assertions across VAL-DATA-001 (3 tests), VAL-DATA-002 (2 tests), and VAL-DATA-003 (3 tests): all pass. Full test:browser-use-discovery suite passed with 184/184 tests. VAL-DATA-001 confirms regex fallback recovers URLs from conversational/non-JSON output with explicit warning. VAL-DATA-002 confirms expanded denylist with subdomain pattern matching enforced across all ingestion paths. VAL-DATA-003 confirms bounded 4-point employer-domain bonus preserves stronger non-employer relevance while prioritizing first-party career pages.
